response.justification: Exceptionally strong match with 8+ years of full-stack development in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and current Staff role at re:cinq directly involving AI-agent infrastructure, MCP frameworks, and developer tooling—a required and often-rare specialization. Twenty-year career demonstrates scalability at scale (millions of requests/second, millions of transactions) and proven architecture capability, though specific mention of Nest.js, Vitest, and PostgreSQL would strengthen the profile.
strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq with TypeScript/Node.js—precisely aligned with required stack and rare specialization
Demonstrated ability to architect and scale systems (Dunnhumby: millions of requests/second; Optilyz: millions of mailings annually)
Extensive full-stack depth with proven ability to adopt new frameworks, languages, and technologies rapidly
concerns: Primary stack frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned, despite clear testing and TDD expertise across roles
PostgreSQL not called out despite SQL and MongoDB experience; depth with relational databases unclear
Authentication, authorization, and security best-practices not explicitly described despite broad systems work

key_factors.factor: Current role in required domain with required stack
